title: SunGard UK arm to enter insolvency on soaring energy prices and landlord deadlock
text: SunGard, which is owned by Fidelity National Information Services (NYSE:FIS) Inc, said its UK arm will enter administration on surging energy costs and a stalemate with landlords regarding rents. The colossal global data management company, which specialises in cloud-based services and physical data centres, was heavily knocked back by the pandemic.

title: FIS Digital One Financial Wellness Suite Products Enable Community Banks to Deliver Simplified, Personalized Financial Services
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--In order to provide its community bank clients with the advanced digital banking tools they need, FIS® (NYSE: FIS) has enhanced its Digital One platform with the launch of Spending Insights, a new offering within the Digital One Financial Wellness Suite. FIS' Digital One hosted platform is pre-integrated with the company's core banking solutions making it easier for FIS' clients to tap into this powerful digital solution. title: Vijay D'Silva and Kenneth T. Lamneck Join the FIS Board of Directors
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--FIS® (NYSE: FIS), a global leader in financial services technology, today announced that Vijay D'Silva and Kenneth T. Lamneck have joined the company's Board of Directors. Mr. D'Silva was a Senior Partner at McKinsey & Co., a management consulting firm, from 1994 until his retirement from McKinsey on March 6, 2022. While at McKinsey, Mr. D'Silva held leadership roles in the firm's Digital and Analytics, Global Payments, Banking & Securities, and Risk

title: Fintech Startups Given Chance to Join ‘Hotbed of Innovation' at 2022 FIS Fintech Accelerator
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Financial technology leader FIS® (NYSE: FIS) announced today that applications are being accepted for the 2022 FIS Fintech Accelerator program, now in its seventh year. The FIS Fintech Accelerator, in collaboration with The Venture Center (of Arkansas) and the State of Arkansas, is focused on finding and helping high-potential fintech startups and growth-stage companies accelerate the development of innovative solutions that advance the financial services in

title: FIS to Present at Upcoming Conference
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--FIS® (NYSE: FIS), a global leader in financial services technology, will present on Wed., March 9, 2022 at the Wolfe Research FinTech Forum at 8:25 a.m. (EST). A live audio webcast, as well as a replay, will be accessible in the Investor Relations section of FIS' homepage, www.fisglobal.com.
